certifications_assessed.name: Media & Entertainment Insights and Solutions (IBM Bronze)

reasoning: Shortlist — strong Salesforce developer with credible platform depth, but verify platform manager and CoE readiness before proceeding. This candidate's highest-signal differentiators are: (1) Copado CI/CD at enterprise scale with 1500+ users confirmed in current role, backed by Copado Fundamentals I & II, (2) production ownership with quantified defect reduction (30% fewer deployment defects) and 90%+ test coverage across 500+ classes, and (3) a broad certification stack including Admin, Platform Developer I, and App Builder. The critical gaps for this specific role are the absence of any evidence of Salesforce Premier Support escalation experience — a named must-have — and no demonstrated experience establishing a Center of Excellence, federated dev strategy, or translating releases into business roadmaps, which are core to this 'Platform Manager' scope. This candidate operates as a Senior Developer / Tech Lead, not yet a Platform Manager. Shortlist, but probe CoE leadership, business stakeholder communication, and premier support experience before advancing.
strengths: COPADO CI/CD AT SCALE: Currently using Copado for end-to-end delivery across a 1500+ user enterprise org at IBM/Informa, with Copado Fundamentals I & II certifications — this is direct, current-role evidence of the JD's single most critical tool requirement.

PRODUCTION OWNERSHIP WITH QUANTIFIED OUTCOMES: Acted as production owner handling critical defects and release stability; built a reusable test framework achieving 90%+ coverage across 500+ classes and reduced deployment defects by 30% — rare level of measurable production impact for a developer profile.

DEEP APEX AND PLATFORM ARCHITECTURE: Designed governor-limit-compliant Apex frameworks (Trigger, Batch, Queueable, Scheduler), LDV optimization, and Flow-first architecture replacing legacy automations — demonstrates the platform engineering depth needed to govern a Salesforce ecosystem, not just build on it.
gaps: SALESFORCE PREMIER SUPPORT EXPERIENCE: The JD explicitly requires experience working with Salesforce's premier support tiers — a key indicator of managing business-critical production at scale. There is zero mention of this on the resume, which is a meaningful red flag for a Platform Manager role where escalation to Salesforce is a core responsibility.

CENTER OF EXCELLENCE AND BUSINESS ROADMAP OWNERSHIP: The role requires establishing a CoE, architecting a federated dev strategy, and translating complex releases into business-friendly roadmaps. This candidate's resume is entirely developer/tech-lead scoped with no evidence of org-wide governance, CoE setup, or executive-facing communication — a level gap that defines the difference between Senior Developer and Platform Manager.

scoring_factors.reason: No notice period specified in JD or resume; no penalty applied.
